net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui

Class WelcomePage

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.core.commands.common.EventManager
      • org.eclipse.ui.part.IntroPart
        • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.WelcomePage
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IExecutableExtension, org.eclipse.ui.intro.IIntroPart

    public class WelcomePage
extends org.eclipse.ui.part.IntroPart
implements org.eclipse.ui.intro.IIntroPart
    PAXWelcome page which will be shown at the first start.
    Author:
    Michael Kagel, Michael Schmidt
